occurrence_sentence: "The[ _Growing Australia's Quantum Technology Industry_ report](https://research.csiro.au/quantum/discussion-paper/) identifies actions that will see Australia's world class research and quantum start-ups support long-term economic growth in industries from mining and agriculture to defence, health and communications." — [The Quantum Daily](https://thequantuminsider.com/2020/05/16/australias-national-science-agency-csiro-launches-quantum-technology-roadmap/).

"The[ _Growing Australia's Quantum Technology Industry_ report](https://research.csiro.au/quantum/discussion-paper/) identifies actions that will see Australia's world class research and quantum start-ups support long-term economic growth in industries from mining and agriculture to defence, health and communications." — [The Quantum Daily](https://thequantuminsider.com/2020/05/16/australias-national-science-agency-csiro-launches-quantum-technology-roadmap/).
